filled.household_spending_on_goods_and_servic: Kharashka qoysaska ee alaabta iyo adeegyada. Qaybta ugu weyn ee GDP.
filled.business_spending_on_capital_goods_new: Kharashka ganacsiga ee alaabta raasumaalka, dhismaha cusub, iyo isbeddellada kaydka.
filled.government_spending_on_goods_and_servi: Kharashka dawladda ee alaabta iyo adeegyada (aan lagu darin wareejinta sida amniga bulshada).
filled.exports_minus_imports_currently_negati: Dhoofinta laga jaray soo dejinta. Hadda taban Maraykanka (khasaaraha ganacsiga).
filled.percentage_change_in_real_gdp_2_3_is_h: Isbeddelka boqolkiiba ee GDP dhabta ah. 2-3% waa caafimaad.
filled.measures_average_price_changes_the_mai: Waxay cabbirtaa isbeddellada qiimaha celceliska. Cabbirka ugu muhiimsan ee sicir-bararka.
filled.percent_of_labor_force_without_jobs_na: Boqolkiiba xoogga shaqada oo aan shaqo lahayn. Heerka dabiiciga ah waa qiyaastii 4%.
filled.interest_rate_banks_charge_each_other_: Dulsaarka bangiyadu ka qaataan midba midka kale. Qalabka ugu weyn ee Fed.
filled.index_of_500_large_us_companies_proxy_: Tusmada 500 shirkadood oo waaweyn oo Maraykan ah. Wakiilka suuqa saamiyada.
filled.survey_of_how_optimistic_consumers_fee: Sahan ku saabsan sida macaamiishu u rajo weyn yihiin dhaqaalaha.
filled.number_of_new_residential_construction: Tirada mashaariicda dhismaha guryaha degganaanshaha ee cusub ee la bilaabay.
filled.exports_minus_imports_surplus_positive: Dhoofinta laga jaray soo dejinta. Faaiido = togan, khasaare = taban.
filled.total_government_borrowing_us_debt_is_: Wadarta amaahda dawladda. Deynta Maraykanka waa qiyaastii $34 tirilyan (2024).
filled.plots_interest_rates_vs_bond_maturity_: Waxay muujisaa heerarka dulsaarka iyo qaangaadhka bondhka. Rogaal = calaamada hoos-u-dhaca.
filled.measures_income_inequality_0_perfect_e: Waxay cabbirtaa sinnaan-la'aanta dakhliga. 0 = sinnaan dhamaystiran, 1 = sinnaan-la'aan ugu badan.
filled.the_most_popular_simple_budgeting_fram: Qaab-dhismeedka miisaaniyadeed ee fudud ee ugu caansan.
filled.save_a_fixed_percentage_before_spendin: Keydi boqolkiiba go'an ka hor inta aadan wax kale ku bixin.
filled.every_dollar_gets_assigned_a_job_incom: Doolar kastaa waxaa loo qoondeeyaa shaqo. Dakhli laga jaray kharash = eber sax ah.
filled.why_doesn_t_gas_demand_drop_as_much_as: Maxay baahida shidaalka u hoos u dhicin sida aad u malaynayso?
filled.why_does_raising_rates_hurt_stocks: Maxay kordhinta heerarka dulsaarku u dhaawacdaa saamiyada?
filled.which_country_has_comparative_advantag: Dalkee ayaa leh faaiido isbarbardhig ah oo kombuyuutar?
filled.what_is_the_most_likely_long_term_effe: Waa maxay saameynta muddada dheer ee ugu suurtogalka badan?
filled.what_is_the_true_cost_of_grad_school: Waa maxay qiimaha dhabta ah ee jaamacadda sare?
filled.what_economic_consequence_followed_in_: Waa maxay cawaaqib dhaqaale oo raacay 2021-2022?
filled.what_will_the_other_station_likely_do: Maxaa xarunta shidaalka kale u badan tahay inay samayso?
filled.what_type_of_market_failure_is_this: Waa nuuc kee guuldarro suuq ah kan?
filled.price_rises_less_demanded_more_supplie: Qiimuhu wuu kacaa ← baahi yar, sahay badan. Qiimuhu wuu dhacaa ← baahi badan, sahay yar. Dheelitir: meesha sahaydu la kulanto baahida.
filled.gdp_c_i_g_x_m_consumption_investment_g: GDP = C + I + G + (X−M). Isticmaal + Maalgashi + Dawlad + Dhoofin saafi ah. Waxay cabbirtaa wadarta wax-soo-saarka dhaqaalaha.
filled.demand_pull_too_much_money_chasing_goo: Jiidashada baahida: lacag aad u badan oo raacaysa alaabta. Riixida kharashka: kharashka wax-soo-saarku wuu kacayaa. Ku dhisan gudaha: filashada wareega mushaharka-qiimaha.
filled.interest_rates_ffr_open_market_operati: Heerarka dulsaarka (FFR) • Hawlaha suuqa furan (iibsiga/iibinta bondhka) • Shuruudaha keydka • Daaqadda dhimista • Hagitaanka horudhaca ah
filled.fiscal_congress_tax_spend_monetary_fed: Canshuur = Koongaraska (canshuur/kharash). Lacag = Fed (heerarka dulsaarka/sahayda lacagta). Labaduba waxay saameeyaan dhaqaalaha siyaabo kala duwan.
filled.divide_72_by_the_interest_rate_to_find: U qaybi 72 heerka dulsaarka si aad u hesho tirada sannadaha lacagtaadu labanlaabmi doonto. 72 ÷ 8% = 9 sano oo labanlaabma.
filled.elastic_1_luxury_has_substitutes_inela: Dabacsan (>1): raaxo, wuxuu leeyahay beddel. Aan dabacsanayn (<1): baahi, ma jiro beddel. Dabacsanaan halbeeg (=1): % isbeddelka P = % isbeddelka Q.
filled.perfect_competition_monopolistic_compe: Tartan dhamaystiran ← Tartan keligii-talis ← Oligopoly ← Keligii-talis. Awood suuq badan = qiimo sarreeya, hufnaan yar.
filled.canvas_summary_supply_demand: Garaafka sahay-baahi oo muujinaya baahida, sahayda, qiimaha dheelitirka, tirada dheelitirka, faaiidada, yaraanta, iyo saameynta canshuurta.
filled.canvas_summary_personal_finance: Garaafka maaliyadda shakhsiyeed oo muujinaya miisaaniyadda bilaha ah oo chaart wareeg ah iyo saadaasha koritaanka dulsaarka isku-dhafan.
filled.canvas_summary_stock_market: Garaafka suuqa saamiyada oo muujinaya taariikhda qiimaha shirkadda la doortay, lacagta boorfooliyaha, lahaanshaha, iyo qiimaha hadda.
filled.canvas_summary_stock_market_empty: Aagga garaafka saamiyada wuu diyaar u yahay suuq la abuuray. Bilow jaandhinta suuqa si aad u aragto taariikhda qiimaha iyo lahaanshaha.
filled.canvas_summary_macro: Dashboardhka dhaqaalaha qaranka oo muujinaya koritaanka GDP, sicir-bararka, heerka dulsaarka, heerka shaqo-la'aanta, isu-dheellitirka ganacsiga, iyo taariikhda siyaasadda.
filled.canvas_summary_inquiry: Habka baaritaanka siyaasadda wuxuu isticmaalaa afar lever siyaasadeed si uu u qaabeeyo natiijo makro fudud. Isticmaal baararka siyaasadda ee hoose si aad u barbardhigto isbeddellada GDP, sicir-bararka, iyo shaqo-la'aanta.
filled.teacher_prompt_supply_demand: Ka dhig ardayda inay saadaaliyaan haddii qiimaha, tirada, faaiidada, ama yaraanta ay isbeddelayaan ka hor intaadan dhaqaajin sliderka.
filled.teacher_prompt_personal_finance: Ka dhig ardayda inay sheegaan hal is-dhaafsi miisaaniyadda iyo hal sabab oo bilaabista dulsaarka isku-dhafan goor hore ay abaalmariso.
filled.teacher_prompt_stock_market: Ka dhig ardayda inay ku kala saaraan dhaqdhaqaaqa qiimaha, aasaaska ganacsiga, iyo khatarta boorfooliyaha hal sharraxaad.
filled.teacher_prompt_entrepreneur: Ka dhig ardayda inay qiyaasaan tirada koobabka si ay u dheelitiraan ka hor intaanay furin ganacsi maalin ah.
filled.teacher_prompt_macro: Ka dhig ardayda inay doortaan hal yool siyaasadeed oo ay aqoonsadaan cabbirka muujin doona horumar ama waxyeello.
filled.teacher_prompt_inquiry: Weydii ardayda lever siyaasadeed kee dhaqaaleyahannadu ay ugu badan isku khilaafi doonaan, kadibna ha sharraxaan sababta modelku uu yahay qiyaas kaliya.
filled.supply_demand_the_price_discovery_engi: Sahayda iyo baahida — matoorka helitaanka qiimaha
filled.demand_slopes_down_cheap_buy_more_supp: Baahidu hoos ayay u janjeertaa (jaban = iibso badan); sahaydu kor ayay u kacdaa (qaali = soo saar badan). Qiimaha iyo tirada dheelitirku waxay ku yaalliin meesha ay kulmaan. «Hantida Qaramada» (1776) ee Adam Smith wali waa aasaas.
filled.50_30_20_needs_wants_save_compound_int: 50/30/20: baahiyo / rabitaanno / kayd. Dulsaarka isku-dhafan waa yaabka siddeedaad; 7%, bilaabista 30 sano goor hore waxay $1 u beddeshaa $7.61. Bixi kaadhka amaahda si buuxda — dulsaarka 19%/sano waa heerka ribo.
filled.stock_market_ownership_at_fractional_s: Suuqa saamiyada — lahaansho heer jajab ah
filled.buy_a_share_own_a_slice_of_the_company: Iibso hal saami = lahow qayb ka mid ah shirkadda. S&P 500 wuxuu bixiyay faaiido celcelis ah oo qiyaastii 10%/sano ah 100 sano. Kala-duw (ha ku dhicin hal saami), hayso muddo dheer (waqtiga suuqa ka wanaagsan yahay saadaasha waqtiga suuqa).
filled.business_sim_you_re_the_founder: Jaandhiska ganacsiga — adiga ayaa aasaasaha ah
filled.revenue_costs_profit_break_even_point_: Dakhli − kharash = faaiido. Dhibicda dheelitirku waa marka kharashyada joogtada ah la daboolo. Ganacsiyada yaryar intooda badan waxay ku fashilmaan sanadka 5aad; kuwa badbaaday waxay heleen ku-habboonaanta alaabta-suuqa. Kharashka helitaanka macmiilka (CAC) iyo qiimaha nolosha (LTV) waa xisaabta maalinlaha ah ee aasaasaha.
filled.gdp_measures_total_output_cpi_measures: GDP wuxuu cabbiraa wadarta wax-soo-saarka; Tusmada Qiimaha Macaamiisha waxay cabbirtaa sicir-bararka; shaqo-la'aantu waxay isticmaashaa U-3 aasaas ahaan. Fed wuxuu dejiyaa heerarka dulsaarka si uu u dheellitiro koboca iyo sicir-bararka — waajibaadka labanlaabta ah ee Koongarasku siiyay 1977.
filled.play_the_simulations_to_discover_econo: Ciyaar jaandhisyada si aad u ogaato fikradaha dhaqaalaha! Dhacdo kastaa waxay bartaa fikrad cusub oo halkan lagu daro.
filled.see_how_inflation_erodes_purchasing_po: Arag sida sicir-bararku u nabaad-guuriyo awoodda iibsiga waqti ka dib. Doolar maanta ka qiimo badan yahay doolar berri!
filled.the_economy_moves_through_repeating_cy: Dhaqaaluhu wuxuu ku dhaqaaqaa wareegyo ku celcelisan oo ballaadhin iyo yaraan ah. Fahamka meesha aan ku jirno wareegga waxay caawisaa saadaasha talaabada xigta.
filled.compound_interest_is_the_eighth_wonder: «Dulsaarka isku-dhafan waa yaabka siddeedaad ee dunida.» — Albert Einstein (waa la sheegaa)
filled.economists_disagree_different_schools_: Dhaqaaleyahannadu isma waafaqaan! Dugsiyada kala duwan waxay siiyaan jawaabo kala duwan su'aalaha isku mid ah. Fahamka aragtiyahaan waxay ku caawisaa inaad si taxaddar leh uga fikirto siyaasadda dhaqaalaha.
filled.markets_range_from_perfect_competition: Suuqyadu waxay u dhexeeyaan tartanka dhamaystiran (iibiyeyaal badan, alaab isku mid ah) ilaa keligii-talis (iibiye keliya, alaab gaar ah). Guji mid kasta si aad wax badan u barato:
filled.gross_domestic_product_measures_the_to: Wax-soo-saarka Guud ee Gudaha wuxuu cabbiraa wadarta qiimaha dhammaan alaabta iyo adeegyada kama dambaysta ah ee lagu soo saaray xuduudaha dal gudahiisa sannad go'an. Maraykanka, sidatan ayaa loo qaybiyaa:
filled.as_price_quantity_demanded_consumers_b: Marka qiimuhu ↑, tirada la doonayo ↓. Macaamiishu wax yar ayay iibsadaan marka qiimuhu kaco. Qalooca baahidu hoos ayuu u janjeeraa.
filled.as_price_quantity_supplied_producers_m: Marka qiimuhu ↑, tirada la soo saaro ↑. Soo-saareyaashu wax badan ayay sameeyaan marka qiimuhu sarreeyo. Qalooca sahaydu kor ayuu u kacaa.
filled.where_supply_meets_demand_this_e_point: Meesha sahaydu la kulanto baahida. «E» tani waxay si toos ah u dejisaa qiimaha suuqa (P*) iyo tirada (Q*).
filled.changing_the_price_moves_along_a_curve: Beddelidda qiimuhu waa dhaqdhaqaaq qalooca ku teedsan. Arrimaha dibadda (tignoolajiyada, dakhliga, doorbidyada) waxay wada beddelaan qalooca oo dhan.
filled.demand_shifted_right_more_people_want_: ▶ Baahidu waxay u beddeshay midig — dad badan ayaa rabo alaabtan (waxaa laga yaabaa in dakhligu kacay, ama isbeddel uu caan ka dhigay). Tani waxay kor u qaaddaa qiimaha iyo tirada dheelitirka labadaba.
filled.demand_shifted_left_fewer_people_want_: ▶ Baahidu waxay u beddeshay bidix — dad yar ayaa rabo alaabtan (beddelku wuu jabay, ama doorbidku wuu beddelay). Qiimaha iyo tiradu labaduba way hoos u dhacaan.
filled.supply_shifted_right_producers_can_mak: ▶ Sahaydu waxay u beddeshay midig — soo-saareyaashu waxay awoodaan inay si jaban u sameeyaan (tignoolajiya cusub, kharash gelin hoose). Qiimuhu wuu hoos u dhacaa, laakiin tiradu way kordhaa.
filled.supply_shifted_left_production_became_: ▶ Sahaydu waxay u beddeshay bidix — wax-soo-saarku wuu adkaaday (masiibo dabiici ah, sharciyo). Qiimuhu wuu kacaa, laakiin tiradu way hoos u dhacaa.
filled.measures_how_much_quantity_demanded_ch: waxay cabbirtaa inta tirada la doonayo isbeddesho marka qiimuhu isbeddelo.
filled.goods_luxury_items_products_with_subst: alaab (alaab raaxo, alaab beddel leh) waxay arkaan hoos-u-dhac weyn oo baahi ah kororka qiime yar.
filled.goods_necessities_like_medicine_gasoli: alaab (baahiyo sida dawada, shidaalka) waxay ilaaliyaan baahi joogto ah iyada oo aan loo eegin qiimaha.
filled.build_equity_but_mortgage_maintenance: Dhis hanti, laakiin deyn guri + dayactir
filled.cheapest_option_save_more: Doorashada ugu jaban, kaydi wax badan
filled.investment_allocation_of_annual_salary: 📊 Qoondeynta maalgashiga (% mushaharka sanadlaha ah ee la maalgeliyay)
filled.describe_what_kind_of_market_you_want_: Sharrax nooca suuqa aad rabto inaad ka ganacsato. AI wuxuu abuuri doonaa 5 shirkadood oo khayaali ah oo leh maaliyad dhab ah.
filled.e_g_renewable_energy_startups_gaming_c: tusaale «shirkadaha bilowga ah ee tamarta la cusboonaysiin karo», «shirkadaha ciyaaraha», «warshadaha hawada sare», ama u daa banaan si loo isku daro...
filled.reset_market_generate_new_companies: ♻ Dib u deji suuqa oo abuur shirkado cusub
filled.type_any_business_idea_and_ai_will_gen: Qor fikrad ganacsi kasta AIna wuxuu abuuri doonaa kharashkaaga bilowga ah, kharashyada maalinlaha ah, iyo qiimaha. Kadibna maalin-maalin u orod!
filled.e_g_food_truck_dog_walking_tutoring_ba: tusaale gaadhi cunto, socodsiinta eyaha, cashar, dukaan roodhi, horumarinta abka...
filled.close_business_start_new: ♻ Xir ganacsiga oo bilow mid cusub
filled.gdp_contracting_unemployment_climbing_: GDP wuu yaraanayaa. Shaqo-la'aantu way kacaysaa. Wadarta baahidu kuma filna.
filled.rare_and_ugly_high_inflation_low_growt: Naadir oo xun: sicir-barar sare + koboc hooseeya. Tusaalaha naxdinta OPEC ee 1970-meeyadii. Way adag tahay in la hagaajiyo.
filled.growth_strong_but_inflation_spiking_ce: Kobocu wuu xoog badan yahay laakiin sicir-bararku wuu kacayaa. Bangiga dhexe wuxuu u badan yahay inuu si xoog leh u riixo bareega.
filled.gdp_up_inflation_contained_goldilocks_: GDP kor, sicir-bararka waa la xakameeyay. Aag habboon — waara hadda.
filled.small_net_effect_policy_levers_roughly: Saameyn saafi ah oo yar. Levarrada siyaasaddu waxay isku baabbi'iyaan qiyaastii.
filled.move_four_policy_levers_tax_govt_spend: Dhaqaaji afar lever siyaasadeed (canshuur, kharash dawladeed, heerka dulsaarka, canshuurta gumrugga). Saadaali xaaladda makro ka hor intaadan akhrin. Dhibco ma jiraan, muujin ma jirto.
filled.your_hypothesis_which_lever_has_the_mo: Mala-awaalkaaga (nolosha dhabta ah, lever kee ayay dhaqaaleyahannadu ugu badan isku khilaafaan? Maxay?)
filled.e_g_tariffs_hit_prices_fast_but_the_gd: tusaale, canshuurta gumruggu si degdeg ah ayay u saameysaa qiimaha, laakiin saameynta GDP waxay ku xidhan tahay aargudashada...
filled.what_combination_produces_stagflation_: Isku-darka kee ayaa soo saara «istaag-sicir-barar»? Maxay uga xanuun badnayd siyaasadeed 1970-meeyadii?
filled.tax_cuts_and_govt_spending_both_stimul: Dhimista canshuurta iyo kharashka dawladda labaduba waxay kiciyaan GDP. Kee ayaa soo saara sicir-barar badan doolar kasta oo kicin ah? Maxay?
filled.when_would_a_central_bank_deliberately: Goorma ayuu bangiga dhexe si ula kac ah u keeni doonaa hoos-u-dhac? (Volcker 1979-82.)
filled.do_tariffs_help_domestic_workers_in_th: Canshuurta gumruggu ma caawisaa shaqaalaha gudaha muddada dheer, mise waxay kor u qaaddaa qiimaha dadka oo dhan? Labadaba? Xaggee is-dhaafsigu yaallaa?
filled.this_widget_hard_codes_textbook_keynes: Widgetkani wuxuu si adag u qoraa calaamadaha Keynesian ee buugga. Dhaqaalaha dhinaca sahayda, calaamadee ayaa rogma? MMT hoostiisa? Dhaqaalaha neoclassical (filashada macquulka ah) hoostiisa? Xaggee ayaa modelka Keynesian uu bixiyaa calaamad qaldan marka la barbardhigo xogta dunida dhabta ah?
filled.i_can_explain_why_this_policy_mix_yiel: Waan sharraxi karaa sababta isku-darka siyaasaddan uu u soo saaro xaaladdan dhaqaalaha makro.
filled.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widgetka baaritaanka — dhibco ma jiraan, muujin ma jirto, jawaab shubis ma jirto. Qiimayaasha tirooyinku waa qiyaaso waxbarasho, ma aha model makro dhab ah; jawaabaha dhabta ah waxay ku xidhan yihiin nidaamka lacagta, awoodda aan la isticmaalin, filashooyinka, iyo ganacsiga dibadda. Dhaqaalaha makro waa muran badan — dhaqaaleyahannadu waxay ku khilaafaan calaamadda iyo baaxadda labadaba.
